title: Hidden Colors 5: The Art of Black Warfare
original_title: Hidden Colors 5: The Art of Black Warfare
overview: The history of warfare as it relates to global Black society, broken down into 7 chapters that examines the ways the system of racism wages warfare from a historical, psychological, sexual, biological, health, educational, and military perspective.
